span.p:
Start gate
run/ must not be symlink

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Passt policy
non-root service uid/gid only
run/ owned by service user
mode <= 0700

span.p:
node run/
cvmm/cloud-hypervisor pid
passt.sock + passt.pid
virtiofs pid + Unix sockets

span.p:
cloud-hypervisor
passt mode
inherits service uid/gid or same --runas
no ambient network caps

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
cloud-hypervisor
tap mode
may switch credentials via --runas
ambient CAP_NET_ADMIN

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
passt helper
service account child
no ambient capabilities
foreground direct child

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
virtiofsd per share
service account child
socket group may follow --runas primary group
